nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for working with ClickHouse analytics, covering table design patterns (MergeTree, ReplacingMergeTree, AggregatingMergeTree), query optimization, bulk/streaming inserts, materialized views, and ETL/CDC pipeline patterns.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for generating structured codebase tours (.tour files), defining a five-step workflow (discover, infer reader, verify anchors, write tour, validate) with step types and SMIG writing rules.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for onboarding to an unfamiliar codebase, using a four-phase process (reconnaissance, architecture mapping, convention detection, artifact generation) to produce an onboarding guide and starter CLAUDE.md.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for integrating the CodeScene MCP server to assess code health scores (1–10 scale), run a feedback loop for maintainability improvements, and enforce boundaries on which standalone tools may be called.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive coding standards reference covering TypeScript/JavaScript naming, immutability, error handling, React patterns, REST API design, file organization, JSDoc, performance, testing structure (AAA), and code smell detection.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for conducting competitive platform analysis: establishing a client positioning brief, selecting competitors across taxonomy axes, scoring with a matrix, and producing a shortlist output.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide defining the canonical eight-section structure for a competitive intelligence report, including framing principles, data presentation guidance, and decision-framework requirements.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for Kotlin Compose Multiplatform UI patterns, covering ViewModel state management, event sink pattern, type-safe navigation, slot-based APIs, platform-specific expect/actual composables, and performance optimizations.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for garbage-collecting stale Claude Code configuration, scanning for orphaned hooks, unused skills, redundant rules, and bloated CLAUDE.md sections with safe-first removal workflow.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step ECC installation and configuration guide covering repository cloning, installation level selection, skill/rule installation by category, post-install verification, and optional optimization steps.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for reviewing and optimizing professional social network connection requests (X, LinkedIn) with safety defaults, three intensity modes (light-pass, default, aggressive), and a scoring model.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for repurposing source material into platform-specific content (X, LinkedIn, short video, YouTube, newsletter) with strict source-first workflow, voice handling rules, and hard bans on fabrication.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for implementing a content-hash-keyed file cache using Python frozen dataclasses and a service layer wrapper, with clear design decisions and when-to-use guidance.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for auditing Claude Code context window usage, classifying file reads by value tier, detecting bloat patterns, and producing a context budget report with reclamation recommendations.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Compact skill guide for selecting and combining continuous agent loop patterns (polling, event-driven, combined), with failure modes and recovery strategies.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Minimal configuration file for the continuous-learning-v2 skill, specifying the schema version and observer hook settings.

nodes.name: observe.sh
nodes.summary: Hook entry point for the continuous-learning-v2 observer: resolves the Python command, handles Windows stub detection, manages observer process lifecycle (start/check/restart), and invokes instinct-cli.py with the captured Claude Code session event.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses shell functions with ALL_CAPS naming convention for internal lifecycle helpers; detects Windows app installer stubs to skip non-functional Python.

nodes.name: detect-project.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that detects the current git project identity, normalizes remote URLs, resolves the main worktree root, and updates the continuous-learning project registry for instinct scoping.

nodes.name: instinct-cli.py
nodes.summary: Core CLI for the continuous-learning-v2 instinct management system, providing commands to import, export, evolve, promote, prune, and manage projects' accumulated instinct knowledge files with cross-project deduplication and promotion logic.
nodes.languageNotes: 1900-line single-file Python CLI with no external dependencies beyond stdlib; uses file locking (fcntl) for concurrent-safe registry writes.

nodes.name: homunculus-dir.sh
nodes.summary: Tiny shell library exporting a single function that resolves the homunculus (instinct store) directory from environment variables or XDG_DATA_HOME with a fallback to ~/.local/share.

nodes.name: migrate-homunculus.sh
nodes.summary: Migration script that moves legacy homunculus data directories to the new XDG-compliant storage layout, preserving existing instinct files during the transition.

nodes.name: test_parse_instinct.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for instinct-cli.py covering instinct file parsing, path and URL validation, project detection, registry operations, instinct loading/merging, and all CLI commands (import, export, evolve, promote, projects, prune).

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for the continuous-learning-v2 system, explaining how it passively captures instincts from Claude Code sessions, stores them per-project, promotes high-confidence patterns to global scope, and uses the instinct-cli for management.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for building cost-aware LLM pipelines, covering prompt caching strategies, model tiering (cheap vs expensive), token budget tracking, and batch processing patterns to minimize API costs.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for tracking LLM API cost across sessions using token counting, model pricing lookup, and cumulative session cost reporting to surface cost spikes.

nodes.name: detect_project
nodes.summary: Detects the current git project identity by resolving repo root, normalizing remote URL, computing a stable project hash, handling legacy directory migrations, and calling _update_registry to persist the project record.

nodes.name: parse_instinct_file
nodes.summary: Parses a YAML-like instinct file format into a list of instinct dicts, extracting id, trigger, confidence, domain, actions, and free-form content fields.

nodes.name: cmd_import
nodes.summary: Implements the 'import' CLI command: fetches instincts from a URL or local file, deduplicates against existing project instincts, interactively confirms with the user, and writes new instinct files to the appropriate project or global directory.

nodes.name: cmd_evolve
nodes.summary: Implements the 'evolve' CLI command: collects pending observation instincts, uses an LLM to synthesize evolved skill and agent candidates, and writes the results to the evolved output directory.

nodes.name: cmd_promote
nodes.summary: Entry point for the 'promote' CLI command, dispatching to either targeted single-instinct promotion or auto-promotion of high-confidence candidates.

nodes.name: _promote_auto
nodes.summary: Automatically promotes project-scoped instincts that meet the cross-project recurrence threshold into global scope, with dry-run and force-overwrite options.

nodes.name: cmd_projects
nodes.summary: Implements the 'projects' CLI command to list, delete, gc, or merge known projects in the instinct registry.

nodes.name: _generate_evolved
nodes.summary: Drives the LLM call to synthesize evolved skill and agent markdown files from pending instinct candidates, writing results to the evolved directory.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that parses subcommands (status, import, export, evolve, promote, projects, prune) and dispatches to the appropriate command handler.

nodes.name: load_all_instincts
nodes.summary: Loads all instincts for a project from both project-scoped and global directories, merging and deduplicating by instinct ID.

nodes.name: cmd_status
nodes.summary: Implements the 'status' CLI command: displays current project info, instinct counts by domain, pending observation count, and legacy data warnings.
